steps.name: User clicks on "Users" tab on the sidebar
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('heading', { name: 'CREATE ROLE', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Role', { exact: true }) }).last()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Role', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Fill "Role from automation" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Role', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Expect "toHaveValue" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Role', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Fill "This is a test role from autotest" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Expect "toHaveValue" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
User creates new role with permissions
User checks if new role appeared on the list
User checks if role contains correct description and permissions
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Edit', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('heading', { name: 'EDIT ROLE', exact: true })

Fill "Edited Role name from automation" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Role', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Expect "toHaveValue" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Role', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Fill "Edited description from autotest" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
Expect "toHaveValue" locator('.Input.text-input, .ui.input.Input, .Input').filter({ has: getByText('Description', { exact: true }) }).last().locator('input, textarea').first()
User edits role description and permissions
User checks if role contains new details and permissions
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Remove', exact: true })
User checks if role was deleted
